summary: iter199 Web Push (VAPID + pywebpush) + Firebase Admin HTTP v1 scaffolding testing complete. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: StaffMobile page loads cleanly for MANAGER role with all role-gated components (WhatsNewStrip, OpsSnapshot, ActivityStrip, FinanceTiles) rendering correctly. Service worker /sw.js served with correct Content-Type and contains push event handler. No JS errors related to subscribeWebPush code.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/push/config correctly returns vapid_public_key='BPlvnmjwaboG...', firebase_sender_id='181521636199', configured=true, web_push_ready=false (no private key), native_push_ready=false (no service account)
POST /api/push/register-web correctly validates: rejects non-HTTPS endpoints (400), rejects missing p256dh/auth keys (400), requires X-Briefing-Token (401), returns 200 with device_id on success
POST /api/push/broadcast with admin token returns stats with 'queued' bucket (graceful degradation since VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY unset)
Regression tests pass: POST /api/push/register (native), GET /api/push/devices/mine, GET /api/push/devices/all, POST /api/standup/send
/sw.js served with Content-Type: text/javascript and contains 'self.addEventListener("push"' handler
StaffMobile /m/staff/<manager-token> loads cleanly with no JS errors related to subscribeWebPush code
Role-gated components (WhatsNewStrip, OpsSnapshot, ActivityStrip, FinanceTiles) all render correctly for MANAGER role
seed_data_creation: Test web push subscriptions created during testing (auto-cleaned by test isolation)
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter199 Web Push scaffolding fully tested. New endpoints: (1) GET /api/push/config returns VAPID public key and Firebase sender ID with configured/ready flags. (2) POST /api/push/register-web accepts PushSubscription with endpoint + keys, validates HTTPS and required keys. (3) POST /api/push/broadcast gracefully degrades to 'queued_no_vapid_private' status when VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY not set. Service worker /sw.js served from /app/public/sw.js with push event handler. StaffMobile subscribeWebPush helper (lines 1134-1179) fetches config, requests notification permission, registers SW, subscribes with VAPID key, and POSTs to /register-web. All regression tests pass for existing push endpoints.
